source_proofs.detail: Matter allow, denied, and review contexts are separated with rules and object_acl fields before requests are sent.
Vault allow, denied, and review contexts are separated with rules and object_acl fields before requests are sent.
Synthetic or internal-looking Matter titles are rendered as generic Matter labels instead of raw ids.
Matter review_required is labeled review-needed and billing ethical_wall is labeled restricted.
Matter denied renders DesktopDeniedState, and review_required renders a live-data-review guard panel.
Matter activity read surfaces carry an explicit permission-boundary strip.
Vault denied renders DesktopDeniedState, and review_required renders a live-data-review guard panel.
Vault body content is only rendered in the data branch, after denied/review guards, with copy stating hidden body access.
Vault documents render legal hold and privilege/permission labels through security badges.

touched_rows.label: Matter list denied state
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded state must not leak protected Matter data
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for denied state panel

touched_rows.label: Matter list review-required state
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded state must not leak protected Matter data
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for review-required state panel

touched_rows.label: Vault documents denied state
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded state must not leak protected Vault data
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for denied state panel

touched_rows.label: Vault documents review-required state
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded state must not leak protected Vault data
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for review-required state panel

touched_rows.label: Matter record action strip disabled under denied/review
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded disabled state must not submit writes
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for disabled guarded state

touched_rows.label: Matter Vault action strip disabled under denied/review
touched_rows.audit_boundary: guarded disabled state must not submit writes
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: not applicable for disabled guarded state

touched_rows.label: 새로고침
touched_rows.audit_boundary: read audit expected for protected Matter Vault surfaces
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: read-only refresh; P3/P4 response proof required before PASS

touched_rows.label: 문서 연결
touched_rows.audit_boundary: document facade write audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: repository write expected; Vault document read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: 초안 생성
touched_rows.audit_boundary: builder draft create audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: draft write expected; preview/read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: 검토 준비
touched_rows.permission_boundary: Matter builder draft patch permission context
touched_rows.audit_boundary: builder draft patch audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: draft write expected; preview/read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: 승인 요청
touched_rows.audit_boundary: approval request audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: approval request write expected; approval list read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: Vault 등록 요청
touched_rows.permission_boundary: Matter builder publish permission context and owner approval boundary
touched_rows.audit_boundary: publish request audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: publish is expected blocked before approval; P4 guard proof required before status change

touched_rows.label: 이메일 초안 생성
touched_rows.audit_boundary: email draft create audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: draft write expected; read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: 내용 정리
touched_rows.permission_boundary: Matter email draft patch permission context
touched_rows.audit_boundary: email draft patch audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: draft write expected; read-back required in P4/P5

touched_rows.label: 발송 요청
touched_rows.permission_boundary: Matter email send boundary and provider-blocked context
touched_rows.audit_boundary: email send boundary audit expected by API
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: external provider send is expected blocked until provider receipt; P4/P5 proof required

touched_rows.label: 새로고침
touched_rows.permission_boundary: Vault permission context via x-permission-context and ui_cmp_g5_vault_live
touched_rows.audit_boundary: Vault read audit expected by API response audit_hint_ref
touched_rows.persistence_boundary: read-only refresh; P3/P4 API response proof required before PASS

classification.next_required_proof: P4-T05 audit write requirements before any API-backed PASS; P5 read-back/reload before durable write PASS.
